issues.description: Target filter is incomplete. Effect should target red Characters with cost 3 or more, excluding this Character. Current target only filters by maxCost without color requirement and self-exclusion.
maxCost:3 is incorrect. Card text states 'cost of 3 or more', which means minCost:3, not maxCost:3.

suggestedDsl.effectText: All of your red Characters with a cost of 3 or more other than this Character gain [Rush].
